data.body: GITHUB ACTIONS ENFORCEMENT VALIDATION (validation #2): temp workflow run 29632050718 completed SUCCESS. 'verify-identity --require-authenticated' in the GitHub Actions env (the env where the 206 originally failed), under STRICT enforcement => '824 verified, 1910 unsigned, 0 unknown-author, 0 bad-signature, 0 key-not-valid-at-era (2734 in scope) -> OK — every enforced in-scope event is verified' (exit 0). All 3 environments now confirm 0 enforced-not-verified: local store-check, GitHub Actions under enforcement, AWS review-bot env (fix deployed + resolver mechanism verified). Now landing the temp workflow deletion.
